action.hypothesis: After five non-improving mainline rounds, the single highest-value matched architecture probe is the direct parent family `lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual`. It preserves the same LUTurbo-compatible static-library export form as the current `lowrank_asymmetric_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` mainline, but removes the hand-set asymmetric stage allocation, so this round answers one clean question: is the asymmetry itself actually carrying the current K128/EF12 result, or would the simpler symmetric two-stage soft-codebook backbone be competitive enough to justify future follow-up instead.
action.summary: Use the one allowed matched architecture probe on `lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual`, keeping `K=128`, `EXPANSION_FACTOR=12`, `OPTIMIZER=signum`, and `LR=2.0e-3` fixed and changing only `ARCHITECTURE`.
action.self_review: This obeys the Round 104 probe rule by changing exactly one primary variable, `architecture`, while keeping the current mainline reference recipe fixed. It is a stronger probe than opening a more exotic branch because it isolates whether the current win comes from the soft-codebook two-stage backbone itself or specifically from the asymmetric budget choice, and it stays aligned with LUTurbo deployment constraints.
notes_to_memory: Round 104 spends the single allowed matched architecture probe on `lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` against the exact `lowrank_asymmetric_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` K128/EF12/signum/LR=2.0e-3 mainline reference.

Judge this probe by full-curve shape as well as final FVU, especially whether the simpler symmetric two-stage soft-codebook backbone is competitive enough that the current asymmetric split may be unnecessary.
Return to the `lowrank_asymmetric_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` mainline next round regardless of outcome; this probe is only a yes/no family-worthiness check.
next_hypotheses: If `lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` is clearly weaker than the matched asymmetric mainline, treat the asymmetric stage allocation as a meaningful ingredient and return to mainline recipe work next round.
If `lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual` is competitive on curve shape or endpoint, record it as a simpler reserve family but still return to the asymmetric mainline next round per probe policy.
Do not open a second architecture probe next round; the next step should go back to mainline recipe clarification.
